---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new module, sanitize rule, storage adapter, or behavior
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem you're trying to solve**
Concrete user-facing scenario. "Right now I have to … and I want to …".

**The shape of the change**
What would the API / CLI look like? Be specific. A code snippet of the call site beats a paragraph of prose.

**Where it would live**
See `CONTRIBUTING.md` → "Where to add things". Which extension point fits?

**Backwards compatibility**
Does this break the existing manifest schema (`schemaVersion: 1`)? Existing installs? CLI flags?

**Roadmap fit**
Is this already on `ROADMAP.md`? If so, link it. If not, one sentence on why this belongs in core vs. a plugin.
